violations.text: The door to the outside, located in the front of the establishment, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 02/13/2025
Tabletop ice machine was observed with a crack in the cover. Equipment to be in good repair and proper adjustment. New Violation. Correct By: 01/30/2025
Mop sink observed leaking at discharge pipe. PIC informed. Equipment to be in good repair and proper adjustment. New Violation. Correct By: 02/03/2025

Some areas of the ceiling in the restroom and in the kitchen area were observed in poor repair (previous water damage and/or chipped). The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 02/27/2025
